prompt: Create a dark epic fantasy full-body portrait of a faceless female knight queen standing powerfully on a rain-soaked gothic castle balcony at sunset. She has very long windblown fiery red hair, with the face intentionally obscured by a smooth featureless shadowed mask/blurred blank face. She wears ornate blackened steel plate armor with gold filigree, sharp layered pauldrons, engraved chestplate, chain details, ruby-red roses and glowing ember accents, over a deep crimson embroidered gown and a long black cloak lined with gold floral patterns. In her right hand she holds a flaming longsword angled down toward the wet stone floor, emitting bright orange sparks and molten light; in her left arm she carries a large black kite shield decorated with intricate gold tracery, red roses, and a blazing golden phoenix emblem. The background shows a sprawling medieval city and distant mountains under dramatic storm clouds, heavy rain streaks, and a low golden sun breaking through clouds on the left; a tall gothic cathedral or castle tower rises on the right with one visible crimson banner bearing a gold heraldic bird. Use cinematic high-fantasy realism, ultra-detailed armor, dramatic rim lighting, wet reflective cobblestones, glowing embers, volumetric sunset rays, dark romantic color palette of black, burgundy, gold, and fire orange. Vertical 2:3 composition, low slightly upward heroic angle, centered figure, sharp focus on the knight, no text, no watermark.
